data.content: Implemented configurable max concurrent sessions on branch work/foolery-5fc1. Added settings schema support with default 5 and range 1-20, exposed the control in Settings > Defaults, and wired both the beats page queue logic and terminal-manager limit enforcement to use the configured value. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-5fc1: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (passes with existing repo warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all succeeded. Current implementation commit: 9082028272b8.
